title: Debate Prep
scenario: Prepare a persuasive argument for a school debate on 'Should social media be regulated?' Write a well-structured speech that takes into account the opposing side's view. Assume you are arguing in favor of regulation and use the following key points: privacy concerns, cyberbullying, and spreading misinformation. Limit your speech to 250 words.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the speech clearly present the argument in favor of regulation? Are the key points effectively communicated?
Does the speech effectively address potential counterarguments to regulation?
Is the tone of the speech persuasive and engaging?
Are there any grammatical or spelling errors in the speech?
